title: Bubbles, Suds, and Squeaky Clean Fun!
story: Millions of people celebrate National Bubble Bath Day on January 8 by filling their tubs with warm water and mountains of fluffy bubbles! story: On January 8, people celebrate National JoyGerm Day by spreading happiness like it's contagious!
